summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was invented. Security-sensitive candidate PRs are quarantined with route_security. Non-security PRs are kept open for maintainer or author follow-up; no close, merge, or fix action is recommended from this shard.

actions.reason: Useful independent PR; keep open for maintainer review or branch repair outside this plan-only inventory shard.

Related to the CLI runner progress family; keep open for maintainer review rather than close as duplicate.
